name: Grok 4.20
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed); single-model reasoning configuration with native tool use, sibling to the 4-agent 'Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent' variant
note: xAI's March 2026 flagship reasoning model, sitting chronologically between Grok 4 Heavy (Jul 2025) and Grok 4.3 (Apr 2026). Public beta launched Feb 17, 2026 as 'Grok 4.20 (Beta)'; full Enterprise API GA on Mar 10, 2026. Official model slug (grok-4.20-0309-reasoning) and every documented alias use '4.20' — press/resellers sometimes informally shorten it to 'Grok 4.2', but xAI's own docs never use that spelling.
